description: Generation request envelope using only the activated cross-service telemetry contract. Generation-specific TTFT, TPOT, output-token, grammar, KV, and speculative-decoding instruments remain intentionally undeclared; this dashboard does not infer them.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(sie_gateway_request_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-gateway", operation="generate"}[$rate_window]))) * 1000

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (rate(sie_gateway_request_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-gateway", operation="generate"}[$rate_window]))) * 1000

histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(sie_gateway_dispatch_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-gateway", operation="generate"}[$rate_window]))) * 1000

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le) (rate(sie_gateway_dispatch_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-gateway", operation="generate"}[$rate_window]))) * 1000
sum(rate(sie_worker_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker", operation="generate", outcome="success"}[$rate_window]))

panels.title: Request duration p50 — gateway vs worker (ms)
panels.description: Independent gateway request and worker item durations for generate operations. Their difference is not treated as an additive overhead measurement.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(sie_gateway_request_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-gateway", operation="generate"}[$rate_window]))) * 1000

histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(sie_worker_request_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker", operation="generate"}[$rate_window]))) * 1000

histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(sie_gateway_dispatch_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-gateway", operation="generate"}[$rate_window]))) * 1000

histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(sie_worker_inference_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker", operation="generate", phase="inference"}[$rate_window]))) * 1000

sum by (machine_profile) (rate(sie_gateway_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-gateway", operation="generate", http_status_code=~"5.."}[$rate_window]))

sum by (dispatch_path, lane) (rate(sie_gateway_dispatches_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-gateway", operation="generate", outcome="cancelled"}[$rate_window]))

panels.title: Worker Retries / sec
panels.description: Completed worker items with the bounded retry outcome. Chunk-level stale-attempt telemetry is outside the activated contract.

targets.expr: sum by (model, lane, backend) (rate(sie_worker_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker", operation="generate", outcome="retry"}[$rate_window]))

panels.title: Routing fallbacks / sec by reason
panels.description: Gateway dispatches that carry a bounded fallback reason other than none.

targets.expr: sum by (fallback_reason, dispatch_path, lane) (rate(sie_gateway_dispatches_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-gateway", operation="generate", fallback_reason!="none"}[$rate_window]))

panels.title: Dispatcher Invocation Rate by Path
panels.description: Bounded dispatcher substrate paths for generate operations. Routing-cache-hit estimation is outside the activated contract.

targets.expr: sum by (dispatch_path, lane, outcome) (rate(sie_dispatcher_invocations_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-dispatcher", operation="generate"}[$rate_window]))
sum by (dispatch_path, lane) (sie_dispatcher_inflight{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-dispatcher", operation="generate"})

panels.title: Lane Demand and Active Lease GPUs
panels.description: Authoritative lane-level KEDA state exported remotely. Generation-specific KV reservation remains outside the activated contract.

targets.expr: max by (pool, machine_profile, bundle) (sie_gateway_pending_demand{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-gateway"})
max by (pool, machine_profile, bundle) (sie_gateway_active_lease_gpus{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-gateway"})
sum by (outcome) (rate(sie_gateway_admission_decisions_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-gateway", operation="generate"}[$rate_window]))

histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le, stage, backend, model, outcome) (rate(sie_worker_model_load_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[$rate_window]))) * 1000

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, stage, backend, model, outcome) (rate(sie_worker_model_load_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[$rate_window]))) * 1000

panels.title: Loaded Model State
panels.description: Canonical loaded-state gauge by model, profile, backend, and lane. Grammar cache telemetry remains outside the activated contract.

targets.expr: max by (model, profile, backend, lane) (sie_worker_model_loaded{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"})

panels.title: Worker Queue Depth
panels.description: Canonical queue depth by model, profile, operation, and lane. A dedicated generation saturation flag is outside the activated contract.

targets.expr: max by (model, profile, operation, lane) (sie_worker_queue_depth{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service=~"sie-worker|sie-worker-sidecar", operation="generate"})

panels.title: Worker Batch Fill Ratio
panels.description: Canonical batch-fill ratio by model, lane, and flush reason. Speculative-decoding acceptance remains outside the activated contract.

targets.expr: max by (model, lane, flush_reason) (sie_worker_batch_fill_ratio{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar", operation="generate"})

panels.title: Gateway Generation Events, Tokens, and Latency
panels.description: Gateway-authoritative generation events/token throughput and TTFT/TPOT p95, plus dispatcher invocation p95. All selectors use the collector-owned contract aliases.

targets.expr: sum by (event, reason, outcome) (rate(sie_gateway_generation_events_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-gateway"}[$rate_window]))
sum by (token_kind) (rate(sie_gateway_generation_tokens_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-gateway"}[$rate_window]))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(sie_gateway_generation_ttft_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-gateway"}[$rate_window])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(sie_gateway_generation_tpot_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-gateway"}[$rate_window])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, dispatch_path) (rate(sie_dispatcher_invocation_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-dispatcher", operation="generate"}[$rate_window])))

panels.title: Worker Generation Control-Event Rate
panels.description: Worker token, admission, duplicate-prevention, grammar-cache/request, and model-loading-response rates.

targets.expr: sum by (model, token_type) (rate(sie_worker_generation_tokens_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[$rate_window]))

sum by (model, outcome, reason) (rate(sie_worker_generation_admission_decisions_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[$rate_window]))
sum by (model, dispatch_path) (rate(sie_worker_generation_duplicate_prevented_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[$rate_window]))

sum by (model, phase, result) (rate(sie_worker_generation_grammar_cache_lookups_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[$rate_window]))
sum by (model, grammar) (rate(sie_worker_generation_grammar_requests_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[$rate_window]))

sum by (model, state, outcome) (rate(sie_worker_generation_model_loading_responses_total{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker-sidecar"}[$rate_window]))

panels.title: Worker Generation In-flight and KV Budget
panels.description: Current in-flight request count and reserved/available KV token budget by bounded model/profile identity.

targets.expr: max by (model, profile) (sie_worker_generation_inflight{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"})
max by (model, profile) (sie_worker_generation_kv_reserved{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"})
max by (model, profile) (sie_worker_generation_kv_budget{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"})

panels.title: Worker Generation TTFT, TPOT, and Grammar Compile p95
panels.description: Worker-observed generation latency distributions, split by bounded model/profile and grammar dimensions.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, model, profile, grammar) (rate(sie_worker_generation_ttft_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[$rate_window])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, model, profile, grammar) (rate(sie_worker_generation_tpot_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[$rate_window])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, model, profile, grammar_backend, phase, outcome) (rate(sie_worker_generation_grammar_compile_duration_seconds_bucket{namespace="$namespace", service="$collector", endpoint="prometheus", producer_service="sie-worker"}[$rate_window])))

title: SIE Generation
